title: Llama Stable
description: Adds a Llama Stable to Windswept and Savanna Plateau biomes
body:
**This simple Minecraft mod adds a small llama stable structure to the game.**

![Stable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6d6969604786255377ac52f9ed2aeaa3409b7d.jpeg)

Inside the stable, you’ll find four llamas and a chest containing everything you need to take care of them.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fb45d4b38014c4ddef67966e269ee2ad0d70b9e.jpeg)

Upstairs, there is a small, cozy room with a bed.

![upstairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c59caf8f917ab83ca7fd8c9850368ddd33f71664.jpeg)

The structure spawns in Windswept and Savanna Plateau biomes.


**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
